subject: A snarling elemental hound made of dark stone or ember-flesh streaking forward, its body wrapped in crackling red lightning and trailing sparks, paws igniting flame as it runs
description: A black, lean canine charges directly at the viewer in mid-leap, head low and teeth bared. Its body is wreathed in jagged arcs of crimson and orange electricity, with embers and lightning snaking off its flanks and tail. Sparks scatter from its paws as if striking flint against the ground. The background is a dense field of red and dark red haze with hot ember motes suspended in the air, giving no specific environment — just a charged, smoky atmosphere of pure energy. Lighting is internal and rim-style: the hound is silhouetted dark while red glow erupts from beneath and around it.
foreground: lightning-wreathed black hound mid-charge, mouth open, sparks at paws
background: red and dark red smoke-field with floating embers, no terrain
emotion: ferocious aggression, predatory drive, snarling charge
